title: SailPoint ISC Transform Schema - accountAttribute
description: Strict schema derived from the SailPoint official Account Attribute operation documentation.

sourceName.description: Source display name to search (e.g., 'Active Directory'). If the display name changes, this reference must be updated.

applicationId.description: Alternative to sourceName: source external GUID.

applicationName.description: Alternative to sourceName: source immutable name.

attributeName.description: Account attribute to return (must match the account attribute name visible in the UI or source schema).

accountSortAttribute.description: Attribute name to sort returned accounts by when multiple accounts exist. Default 'created' (ascending; oldest wins).

accountSortDescending.description: Sort order when multiple accounts exist. Default false (ascending).

accountReturnFirstLink.description: If true, return the value from the first account in the sorted list even if null; if false, return the first non-null value. Default false.

accountFilter.description: Database filter (sailpoint.object.Filter) ANDed with the default source+identity filter. Only searchable fields are supported (nativeIdentity, displayName, entitlements).

accountPropertyFilter.description: In-memory filter (sailpoint.object.Filter) applied after retrieval. All account attributes can be referenced.

input.description: Explicit input object. If omitted, the transform uses implicit input configured via UI/source+attribute mapping.

allOf.description: Exactly one source reference must be provided: sourceName OR applicationId OR applicationName.
